case_number: Constitution Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 959 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.3679/2019 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 29-09-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>><<<<<<< Learned Additional AG files statement on behalf of Respondent No.1 / Secretary Health, Government of Sindh, whereas, Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Memon, Advocate files Vakalatnama as well as comments on behalf of Respondent No.5, same are taken on record. Perusal of record reflects that the instant Constitutional Petition was filed in the year, 2019, whereas, on 04-07-2019 notices were issued to the Respondents. Thereafter on 15-09-2025 the following order was passed;- “None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation received. Even comments have not yet been filed by the Respondents. Under the circumstances, Respondents are directed to file their respective comments on or before the next date of hearing. In case of failure, respondents shall be in attendance. Let direct notice be issued to the Petitioner and intimation notice to his Counsel.” Despite notice neither petitioner nor her Counsel are in attendance. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioner and her Counsel prima facie suggests either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the instant Constitution Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
